seasonalContext.name: Tobacco marketing season
seasonalContext.note: TIMB floors and contract deliveries. Grading, pricing and side-marketing tension dominate farm cashflow talk.

seasonalContext.name: Grain marketing & GMB deliveries
seasonalContext.note: GMB deliveries, private buyers, storage-versus-sell decisions. Margin is made or lost after the crop is already in.

seasonalContext.name: Winter wheat under irrigation
seasonalContext.note: The irrigated winter season: wheat scheduling, water budgets, frost watch. A commercial-and-A2 audience window.

seasonalContext.name: Dry season review & next-season planning
seasonalContext.note: The season post-mortem window: what the field data said, what it cost to ignore, what changes before the next rains.

Margin is made or lost after the crop is already in. · Winter wheat under irrigation — The irrigated winter season: wheat scheduling, water budgets, frost watch. A commercial-and-A2 audience window.

hookCandidates.text: Before the first rains commit your seed — confirm these three.

dataCandidates.statement: Zimbabwe needs about 2.2 million tonnes of cereal a year; 2024 domestic output fell far short, forcing large imports.
More than 5.3 million Zimbabweans were projected to face food insecurity following the 2024 drought.
Over 900,000 hectares of maize — half the 1.8 million planted — were devastated by the 2024 drought.
dataCandidates.source: Government of Zimbabwe (State of Disaster declaration)

slots.trendAngle: Tobacco marketing season — TIMB floors and contract deliveries. hookCandidates.text: By harvest, the yield you lost was decided *months* ago.

dataCandidates.statement: About one-fifth of cereals produced in Sub-Saharan Africa is lost between production and consumption.
dataCandidates.source: FAO, via World Bank 'Missing Food' analysis

dataCandidates.statement: Grain post-harvest losses across Sub-Saharan Africa were valued at around US$4 billion a year — enough to meet the annual food needs of over 40 million people.
Storage and handling losses alone for cereals in Sub-Saharan Africa are estimated at 10–12%.

slots.trendAngle: Winter wheat under irrigation — The irrigated winter season: wheat scheduling, water budgets, frost watch. A commercial-and-A2 audience window.

hookCandidates.text: One number per field. That's the whole idea.

dataCandidates.statement: Precision nitrogen management in maize cut fertiliser use by up to 30% with no loss in yield.
dataCandidates.source: CIMMYT (International Maize and Wheat Improvement Center)

dataCandidates.statement: NDVI combined with deep learning has reached crop-health classification accuracy near 98% in recent studies — the analytical layer behind a reliable field score.
dataCandidates.source: arXiv / ResearchGate, NDVI + neural network crop health classification

dataCandidates.statement: Advanced vegetation and stress indices can flag crop stress 10–15 days earlier than conventional visual methods.
dataCandidates.source: Frontiers in Plant Science (hyperspectral stress detection framework)
